phrases.intent_en: When does the next train to Prague leave
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede další vlak do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech speakers often use 'kolej' (track) interchangeably with 'nástupiště' (platform) in casual speech.

likely_response.local: Za dvanáct minut z druhé koleje.
likely_response.translation_en: In twelve minutes from platform two.

responses.english: In twelve minutes from platform two.
responses.french: Za dvanáct minut z druhé koleje.

phrases.intent_en: How do I validate my ticket before boarding
phrases.text_local: Jak si mám označit jízdenku před nástupem?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation machines are typically yellow and located before the platform area. Failing to stamp a ticket can result in a fine.

likely_response.local: V tom žlutém stroji u vchodu do podchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: In the yellow machine at the entrance to the underpass.

responses.english: In the yellow machine at the entrance to the underpass.
responses.french: V tom žlutém stroji u vchodu do podchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy the separate Sedlec line ticket
phrases.cultural_note: For a local line, staff will direct you to the main ticket sources. The Sedlec line is a short local journey.

likely_response.local: U pokladny, nebo v automatu u vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter, or at the machine by the entrance.

responses.english: At the counter, or at the machine by the entrance.
responses.french: U pokladny, nebo v automatu u vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Is the cash-only counter still open
phrases.text_local: Je ještě otevřená pokladna, co bere jen hotovost?
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller Czech station counters often close in the early evening and may be cash-only, especially outside major cities.

likely_response.local: Ano, ale jen do šesti hodin.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, but only until six o'clock.

responses.english: Yes, but only until six o'clock.
responses.french: Ano, ale jen do šesti hodin.

phrases.intent_en: Where is platform two for Prague trains
phrases.text_local: Kde je druhé nástupiště na vlaky do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech stations often use podchod (underpass) to reach platforms. Simple directional cues are common.

likely_response.local: Podchodem, pak doprava po schodech nahoru.
likely_response.translation_en: Through the underpass, then right up the stairs.

responses.english: Through the underpass, then right up the stairs.
responses.french: Podchodem, pak doprava po schodech nahoru.
